title: LIVE: NEW Mythos 5.1?
summary: Julian Goldie SEO promotes an Agent OS product through a live streaming session. The content focuses on building agentic operating systems and monetizing AI tools for time and cost savings.
writeup: This live stream from Julian Goldie SEO centers on an Agent OS product, with attention to building agentic operating systems and to monetizing AI tools for time and cost savings. The session ties multi-agent systems to practical setups, framing AI agents as the basis for the operating system being promoted. The takeaway is a product-driven walkthrough rather than a neutral tutorial, with the pitch oriented toward efficiency and revenue.
